reason: Archived fields that are meaningful background but not accepted by requirements.control.schema.json additionalProperties=false.

approval_required_before: implementation execution under this controlled run
what_the_user_approved.reason: The user approved the materialized compact control commitment.

rubric.strongest_positive_status: Benchmark trust repair complete and final SOTA verdict valid under repaired evidence.
minimum_evidence_for_strongest_positive: all required outcomes have run-local evidence
all required result paths pass counterexample review
new or repaired benchmark evidence exists
human-gated actions have explicit approval if performed
downgrade_rules: If repaired benchmark fails anomaly or fairness gates, SOTA must be downgraded or withdrawn.
If tests pass but no new benchmark evidence exists, status remains incomplete.
If benchmark evidence exists but README/report still cite stale claims, status remains incomplete.
If external/live actions are needed, report exact human_gate requirement instead of claiming completion.
rubric.external_dependency_handling: No live external proxy, credentials, destructive action, push, or tag may be used without human_gate approval.

questions_deferred_to_design: Whether to replace the Python proxy with a Rust fixture or retain Python with strict anomaly controls.
Which client ordering policy becomes canonical: seeded randomized order, A/B/B/A interleaving, or another paired design.
Which aggregation metric is canonical for SOTA verdict and which are supporting diagnostics.
How proxy send time gates should be parameterized without making the gate gameable.
How README figures should show repaired evidence without hiding failed cells.

human_gate_required_for: using live external services or credentials
declaring SOTA preserved after repaired benchmark

known_assumptions: The approved SOTA numeric threshold remains the previously approved 20% geomean threshold unless the user revises it.
The benchmark baseline remains same-process libcurl library, not curl CLI.
The repaired benchmark may preserve, downgrade, or withdraw the current SOTA claim depending on evidence.
Implementation strategy can change under reviewed_replanning, but target and evidence gates cannot be weakened.
fields.agent_delegation_preference: Subagents may be used for independent counterexample review when explicitly authorized by the user or the active control mode.
fields.parallel_execution_authority: Allowed after orchestration approval when write scopes are disjoint or review is independent.
